revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-7-020

Alternative term: Shielded transformer

A transformer in which an earthed screen or shield is interposed between the primary and secondary circuits, to reduce the transmission of transients by way of capacitance coupling between the windings.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Screened transformer}}
